# Eva Arribas

# 📝 **Bio**

------------------------------------------------------------------------

I am Eva Arribas, a biotechnologist with a master’s in bioinformatics, passionate about computational biology and data-driven research. I was part of BioGenies, during my master’s internship and Erasmus stay in Białystok, and I collaborated with IBB and MUB on the analysis and prediction of liquid-liquid phase separation (LLPS). I am deeply grateful for the opportunity to join such an excellent and supportive team.
